seo_title: Bose Sleep Startup SOND Exits Stealth with $7M Funding
meta_description: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose's former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M funding. Learn about its debut product Dreambuds and what it means for the…
body_html:
SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose's former head of sleep, has exited stealth with $7M funding.

Key Features of DreambudsClosed-loop, in-ear system capturing 12 physiological signals from the wearerActs on these signals in real time to help consumers get better sleepDebut product from SOND, a company founded by Bose's former head of sleepDreambuds Technical SpecificationsParameterDescriptionPhysiological signals captured12Real-time action takenYesProduct typeIn-ear systemPotential Impact on the IndustrySOND's debut product Dreambuds has the potential to revolutionize the sleep tech industry with its innovative closed-loop, in-ear system.

source.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
source.summary: SOND, a sleep tech startup co-founded by Bose's former head of sleep, has emerged from stealth mode with $7 million in funding. The company has introduced its debut product, Dreambuds, a closed-loop in-ear system that tracks 12 physiological signals to help consumers improve their sleep quality through real-time interventions.
